title: Dimetia hedyotidea

Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Dimetia hedyotidea include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or a tea, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
